title: Scorodonia arduini
taxonomy: Scorodonia arduini is classified within the family Rosaceae. This classification places it among the rose family, which includes other plants like apples and pears. The genus Scorodonia is a small group of flowering plants. Scorodonia arduini specifically belongs to the Scorodonia genus and is further classified as a species within it. Its classification helps to understand its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the family Rosaceae.
uses: Scorodonia arduini is known for its use in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
